QF.id: VB Fund Distribution and Channel Management_22

question.text: Mr. Patel, a tech-savvy investor, wants to invest in mutual funds from 8 different AMCs using a single account. Which service should he use?

answer.text: MF Utilities (MFU) with a Common Account Number (CAN)
Open 8 separate bank accounts — one for each AMC
Register with SEBI as a fund manager

explanation.text:
**The Logic:** MF Utilities (MFU) with a Common Account Number (CAN) is designed exactly for this purpose — to allow investors to transact across multiple AMCs using a single account number. Mr. Patel can manage all 8 AMC investments from one platform.
**The Trap:** You do not need separate bank accounts or PAN cards for different AMCs. One CAN works across all participating AMCs. Registering as a fund manager is completely unrelated.
**Cross-Exam Context:** Also tested in Series V-A. MFU + CAN simplifies multi-AMC investing.
**Distributor's Pro-Tip:** For clients with diverse portfolios across many AMCs, MFU is a game-changer. It also makes it easier for you to track and manage all their investments in one place.
